title: AI-901 Mock Exam 1: Foundry and Applied AI
description: A 50-question unofficial mock paper aligned to the AI-901 skills measured from April 15, 2026. Includes realistic scenarios, detailed explanations, and official Microsoft Learn references. Original practice content; not official exam questions.

items.prompt: A developer is building a customer-support assistant in Microsoft Foundry. The assistant must answer only from uploaded product manuals and must say when the manuals do not contain the answer. Which design should the developer choose?
items.answer: Create a prompt agent with file search grounded on the manuals and instructions to answer only from retrieved content
options: Create a prompt agent with file search grounded on the manuals and instructions to answer only from retrieved content
Prompt agent
Hosted agent
Call the Responses API directly from the existing process
items.explanation: “Create a prompt agent with file search grounded on the manuals and instructions to answer only from retrieved content” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Foundry apps and agents combine an appropriate deployment with instructions, SDK or API calls, tools, identity, and evaluation according to the scenario.

items.prompt: A team has an existing LangGraph agent running in AKS. They want to keep the orchestration code but use Foundry models and built-in tools through a single endpoint. What should they call from their existing process?
options: The Responses API
Hosted agent
Call the Responses API directly from the existing process
Create a custom tool hosted outside Foundry and call it from a prompt agent
items.explanation: “The Responses API” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Foundry apps and agents combine an appropriate deployment with instructions, SDK or API calls, tools, identity, and evaluation according to the scenario.

items.prompt: A company wants to build an internal HR assistant quickly in the Foundry portal. It needs instructions, model selection, file search, and no custom orchestration code. Which agent type is the best fit?
options: Prompt agent
Call the Responses API directly from the existing process
Create a custom tool hosted outside Foundry and call it from a prompt agent
Use a lightweight client that invokes a published agent endpoint
items.explanation: “Prompt agent” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Foundry apps and agents combine an appropriate deployment with instructions, SDK or API calls, tools, identity, and evaluation according to the scenario.

items.prompt: A developer needs a Foundry agent with custom Python orchestration, package dependencies, and a managed endpoint with scaling and observability. Which agent type should they use?

Create a custom tool hosted outside Foundry and call it from a prompt agent
Use a lightweight client that invokes a published agent endpoint
Prompt agent
items.explanation: “Hosted agent” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Foundry apps and agents combine an appropriate deployment with instructions, SDK or API calls, tools, identity, and evaluation according to the scenario.

items.prompt: A Python app must authenticate to a Foundry project endpoint without storing an API key in source control. Which code pattern is most appropriate?
items.answer: Create an AIProjectClient with the project endpoint and DefaultAzureCredential
options: Create an AIProjectClient with the project endpoint and DefaultAzureCredential
OAuth On-Behalf-Of for user-delegated tool access
Microsoft Entra authentication with RBAC scoped to the Foundry project
A browser-exposed API key stored in localStorage
items.explanation: “Create an AIProjectClient with the project endpoint and DefaultAzureCredential” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Foundry apps and agents combine an appropriate deployment with instructions, SDK or API calls, tools, identity, and evaluation according to the scenario.

items.prompt: A project endpoint is shown as https://contoso.ai.azure.com/api/projects/support. What is this endpoint used for in a Foundry SDK client?
items.answer: Connecting the client to a specific Foundry project for model, agent, and tool calls
options: Connecting the client to a specific Foundry project for model, agent, and tool calls
Lower temperature and constrain maximum output tokens
Use a smaller low-latency model after evaluation
Use a larger reasoning model for complex multi-step tasks
items.explanation: “Connecting the client to a specific Foundry project for model, agent, and tool calls” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Foundry apps and agents combine an appropriate deployment with instructions, SDK or API calls, tools, identity, and evaluation according to the scenario.

items.prompt: A developer needs to choose a model for extracting fields from short support messages at very high volume. Accuracy requirements are modest and latency/cost are important. Which model selection approach is most appropriate?
items.answer: Use a smaller faster model that meets quality targets after evaluation
options: Use a smaller faster model that meets quality targets after evaluation
Use a smaller low-latency model after evaluation
Use a larger reasoning model for complex multi-step tasks
Change the model deployment and re-test quality, latency, and cost
items.explanation: “Use a smaller faster model that meets quality targets after evaluation” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Content Understanding uses analyzers and schemas to turn documents, images, audio, or video into grounded structured output.

items.prompt: A compliance bot must produce deterministic policy summaries in a fixed format. Which model setting should generally be reduced?
options: Temperature
Use a larger reasoning model for complex multi-step tasks
Change the model deployment and re-test quality, latency, and cost
Use grounding instead of relying only on model pretraining
items.explanation: “Temperature” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Model capability, deployment choice, and inference settings should be selected against measured quality, latency, cost, and consistency requirements.

items.prompt: A chat app sometimes returns long answers that overflow the mobile UI. Which model parameter should the developer configure?

Change the model deployment and re-test quality, latency, and cost
Use grounding instead of relying only on model pretraining
Lower temperature and constrain maximum output tokens
items.explanation: “Maximum output tokens” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Model capability, deployment choice, and inference settings should be selected against measured quality, latency, cost, and consistency requirements.

items.prompt: A team is preparing a customer-facing generative AI app for launch. Which TWO actions most directly improve transparency?
answers: Tell users that they are interacting with AI
Document the system’s intended uses and known limitations
options: Tell users that they are interacting with AI
Document the system’s intended uses and known limitations
Increase temperature to make every answer different
Remove human review so the experience is consistent
items.explanation: “Tell users that they are interacting with AI” and “Document the system’s intended uses and known limitations” are the required choices because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Responsible AI decisions should address the relevant principle in the design and operation of the solution, rather than treating governance as a final UI step.

Key phrase extraction

items.explanation: “Validate tool inputs and restrict tool access with identity and authorization controls” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement.
